arts.ttl: What channel is Celtic vs St Mirren? Live stream, TV, ref, VAR and teams news for Trophy Day
arts.sum: The four-in-a-row champions will be presented with the league trophy this weekend but Saints will look to spoil the party

arts.ttl: Reo Hatate suffers Celtic injury blow as Brendan Rodgers rules star out of Scottish Cup Final
arts.sum: Rodgers spoke to the press at Lennoxtown ahead of Saturday's league finale at home to St Mirren

Champions Celtic host St Mirren on trophy day, with the Hoops hopeful of a domestic treble and Saints set to finish no higher than fifth in the 2024/25 Scottish Premiership. The Hoops haven't lost to...
